name: Minimal
description: Clean, typographic 9:16 slide with large serif heading, monospace body, and optional image.
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Heading
slots.description: Main heading text. 1–8 words work best.

slots.label: Label / tag
slots.description: Short uppercase eyebrow tag above the heading (e.g. 'Chapter 01').

slots.label: Image
slots.description: Optional image. File path (relative to data JSON) or https:// URL.

slots.label: Image position
slots.description: Where to place the image: 'top' (hero above text) or 'bottom' (below heading). Default: bottom.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for the label, rule, and body text. The only color you need to change per slide.

slots.label: Background color
slots.description: Slide background. Keep dark — text colors are fixed for dark backgrounds.

slots.label: Footer text
slots.description: Small text at the bottom-left corner.
